query: CREATE TABLE bonus_distributions (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, pool_id INT NOT NULL, distribution_date BIGINT NOT NULL, period_start BIGINT NOT NULL, period_end BIGINT NOT NULL, total_revenue_base DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, pool_contribution DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, total_distributed DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, eligible_members INT NOT NULL, per_member_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, distribution_method VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'equal', status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending', approved_by INT, approved_at BIGINT, blockchain_hash VARCHAR(64), notes TEXT, created_at BIGINT);
